parents.subject: LU-12187 ec: Client adoption for erasure-coding

commit.subject: LU-12187 tests: make sanity-flr 62 work with older version
commit.message:
LU-12187 tests: make sanity-flr 62 work with older version

With the addition of LOV_PATTERN_PARITY the default bad
pattern has changed. Check for the parity connect_flag
so sanity-flr 62 test can run with any Lustre version.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-flr env=ONLY=62
Change-Id: I4a39f4405129d9593b3fde0dacaf9c9341460281
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
